title: Mannavanae Mannavanae Lyrics Puli Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Mannavanae Mannavanae
Singer(s): Soorj Santhosh, MLR Karthikeyan, Chinmayi, Anitha
Movie: Puli
Music: DSP


Mannavane Mannavane
Maayaloga manmadhane
Theekadalai thaandi varum
Thennavane

Vallavane Vallavane
Yaanai balam ullavane
Vaanavillal ambu vidum
Vallavane

Kaththi indri Raththamindri
Verum kannaal
olai seivaai
Ival raani kottai
Ilavarasi
Unakenna vendum
Ponnin mazhaya
Pennin selaya

Vallavane Vallavane
Yaanai balam ullavane
Vaanavillal ambu vidum
Vallavane

En vaalum velum vella
Vaanai mutti thalla
Siragu mulaitha vengai
Naane ippodhu

En vaanam thaandi sella
Nee mayaparavai alla
Ennai meeri venai engum thapaadhu

Vaanil vinmeeno naane
Kadalil karumeeno naane
Rendum ada undhal kaiyil seraadhu

Vaanam en valayal petti
kadalo en neechal thotti
Meengal en kaalil metti
Maayajaalam oyaadhu inge

Vallavane Vallavane
Yaanai balam ullavane
Vaanavillal ambu vidum
Vallavane

Hey aandaan adimai ellam
Aandavan itta sattam
Melor keezhor ellam
Vidhiyin utharavu

Hey aandaan adimai ellam
Sattam alla thittam
Iraivan peraal manidhan
Seidha sacharavu

Kaatil idhu engal aatchi
Neeyo oru pattaam pochi
Kaatrai un siragil yettram
Paarkaadhey

Poovil siru theaenai kolla
Aatchi adhu thevai illa
Yeriyum thee kuchi podhum
Kariyaai maarum
Moththa kaadum

Aanmayulla raani ival
Aalavandha gnani ival
Aangalodu potti ittu
Thotradhillai

Vaan anindha vennilavum
Thaeivadhundu saaivadhundu
Naan anindha kreedam endrum
Saaivadhillai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Mannavanae Mannavanae conveys themes of love and celebration, encapsulating the joy of romantic moments.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in Puli, enhancing the festive atmosphere and showcasing the characters' joyful interactions.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Chinmayi, MLR Karthikeyan, and Sooraj Santhosh.

Who is the music director for this song?

The music director for Mannavanae Mannavanae is currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 30, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mannavanae Mannavanae, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the joyous moments shared between the characters in Puli. The upbeat rhythm and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The collaboration of talented singers adds depth to the song, enhancing its appeal. Overall, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mannavanae Mannavanae from Puli is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring a unique collaboration of talented singers Chinmayi, MLR Karthikeyan, and Sooraj Santhosh. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics make it a perfect anthem for any festive occasion. Dive into the energetic vibes that this track brings to the screen and your playlists!
stanzaMeanings: O king, O king, the charming one, the one who comes crossing the sea, the southern one.
O strong one, O strong one, the one with the strength of an elephant, you release arrows from the sky, O strong one.
Without a sword or blood, just with a glance, she creates waves. What do you want, O princess? The rain of gold, the beauty of a woman.
O king, O king, the charming one, the one who comes crossing the sea, the southern one.
O strong one, O strong one, the one with the strength of an elephant, you release arrows from the sky, O strong one.
My life and my weapon are bright. The sky is filled with light. The thorny mango tree has blossomed now.
My sky is not just for you. You are not a mere illusion. I will not let you escape anywhere.
I am the one in the sky, I am the one in the sea. Both cannot come together in my hands.
The sky is my boundary, the sea touches my feet. Fish are resting on my feet. The illusion does not flow here.
O king, O king, the charming one, the one who comes crossing the sea, the southern one.
O strong one, O strong one, the one with the strength of an elephant, you release arrows from the sky, O strong one.
Hey, all the servitude is the command given by God. Everything above and below is the result of fate.
Hey, all the servitude is not just a command. By God's grace, what man does is the truth.
This is our rule in the forest. You are just a passing bird. The wind should not disturb your wings.
In the flower, the small honeybee is not needed. That rule is not necessary. When the fire burns, it will change everything in the forest.
The queen with grace, she is wise. She has not mixed with them.
The sky is filled with the bright moon. There is a need and there is a loss. I will always play this game, there is no loss.
